steps.title: Fastest path: try the choices
steps.content: Because the choices give possible solutions, plug them into the equation instead of solving from scratch. The only choice that satisfies the equation is C, $8$.

steps.title: Apply zero product property
steps.content:
When a product of factors equals zero, at least one factor must equal zero. For the equation $$-5(v-8)(v-3)(v+6) = 0$$ the constant $-5$ is never zero, so we set each variable factor equal to zero:
  • $v - 8 = 0$ gives $v = 8$
  • $v - 3 = 0$ gives $v = 3$
  • $v + 6 = 0$ gives $v = -6$

steps.title: Identify the solution in the choices
steps.content: The solutions are $v = 8$, $v = 3$, and $v = -6$. Of these, only $v = 8$ appears in the answer choices. That confirms C is correct.
